get.summary: Retrieve and return an Apple Wallet (.pkpass) digital membership card by user ID.
get.description: This GET endpoint dynamically generates an Apple Wallet membership pass (.pkpass) for the specified user ID and returns it as a downloadable file. The endpoint is typically accessed from Safari or iOS for direct installation into Apple Wallet.

schema.description: Returns a .pkpass file for Apple Wallet installation.

parameters.description: The unique user ID associated with the pass.

post.summary: add a surcharge to a shop each shop can only have one surcharge

message.example: Invalid token or invalid product order or product low stock

surchage_id.description: Optional, if provided, update existing surcharge

time_rules.description: Recurring weekly time-based rules that determine when the surcharge applies. Each rule specifies the days of the week and a time window (24-hour format). Useful for weekend surcharges, dinner periods, or late-night fees.

days.description: List of days the rule applies, e.g. ["Sat", "Sun"].

date_rules.description: Date-based rules defining specific days or date ranges during which the surcharge applies. Supports single dates (e.g., "2025-12-25") and multi-day intervals (e.g., public holiday periods or special events).

from_date.description: Optional. Start date of a date range (YYYY-MM-DD). Inclusive.

to_date.description: Optional. End date of a date range (YYYY-MM-DD). Inclusive.
